passes.name: 3-Class Drop-In Sampler
passes.short_description: Try three adult improv drop-in classes over 60 days.
passes.full_description: Perfect for first-timers or busy schedules, this sampler includes admission to any three adult improv drop-in classes. Valid for 60 days from first use at our Training Center locations.
passes.terms: Non-transferable. Good for adult drop-in classes only. Must be used within 60 days of first visit.

passes.name: Weekend Warrior Drop-In Trio
passes.short_description: Three Saturday or Sunday drop-ins at a special rate.
passes.full_description: Includes three credits good for any weekend (Saturday or Sunday) adult improv drop-in class. Ideal for busy professionals planning a few fun weekends.
passes.terms: Valid only for designated weekend drop-in classes. Expires 45 days after first redemption. No refunds for unused visits.

passes.name: Weeknight Improv 4-Pack
passes.full_description: Save on your practice with four credits for our Monday–Thursday evening adult drop-in improv classes at the Training Center.
passes.terms: Good for any scheduled adult evening drop-in class. All four visits must be used within 90 days of first visit.

passes.name: 5-Class Drop-In Pass
passes.short_description: Five flexible drop-in visits for ongoing practice.
passes.full_description: Includes five visits to any adult improv drop-in class on the schedule. Great for performers looking to keep their skills sharp all season.
passes.terms: Visits may be shared between family members but not resold. All visits must be used before the expiration date.

passes.name: Date Night Show Pass
passes.short_description: Two general admission tickets for any Friday or Saturday show.
passes.full_description: Make it a night out with two general admission tickets for any regularly scheduled Friday or Saturday evening improv show in our Mainstage Theater.
passes.terms: Subject to availability. Not valid for special events or festivals. Both tickets must be used for the same performance.

passes.name: Family Matinee 4-Pack
passes.short_description: Four tickets to any family-friendly matinee.
passes.full_description: Bring the whole family to laugh together with four tickets good for any all-ages or family-friendly matinee show.
passes.terms: Valid only for designated family-friendly matinee performances. Tickets may be used across multiple dates.

passes.name: Level 1 Class Pass
passes.short_description: Covers tuition for one 8-week Level 1 improv class.
passes.full_description: Apply this pass to pay for any 8-week beginner (Level 1) adult improv class. Ideal as a gift when you don’t know which start date they’ll choose.
passes.terms: Redeemable for one qualifying 8-week adult improv class. Registration is required; classes may fill up.

passes.name: Class + Show Starter Bundle
passes.short_description: One 8-week class plus two show tickets.
passes.full_description: Our most popular starter bundle: includes tuition for one 8-week adult improv class and two general admission show tickets for any regular performance.
passes.terms: Show tickets may be used before, during, or after the class session; subject to availability.

passes.name: Unlimited Shows Monthly Membership
passes.short_description: Attend as many regular shows as you like for one month.
passes.full_description: This membership grants unlimited general admission to all regularly scheduled shows for 30 days from activation. Perfect for superfans and students.
passes.terms: Valid for the passholder only. Not valid for festivals, special events, or outside rentals.

passes.name: Training Center Membership
passes.short_description: Discounted drop-ins and priority registration for a year.
passes.full_description: Get $5 off every drop-in class, early access to class registrations, and special members-only jams for 12 months from activation.
passes.terms: Benefits apply only to the registered member. Discounts cannot be combined with other offers.

passes.name: Teen Improv Camp Flex Pass
passes.short_description: Covers one two-week teen improv camp session.
passes.full_description: This camp pass may be applied to any two-week Teen (ages 13–17) improv camp session. Great for families who need scheduling flexibility.
passes.terms: Redeemable for one qualifying teen camp. Camp sessions may sell out; early registration recommended.

passes.name: 10-Class Practice Pass
passes.short_description: Ten adult drop-in visits at the best per-class rate.
passes.full_description: Commit to your improv growth with ten visits to any adult drop-in class, weekday or weekend. Our most economical per-class pricing.
passes.terms: Visits may not be shared. Any unused visits at expiration are forfeited.

teams.name: Midnight Elevator
teams.short_description: A long-form house team that takes you floor by floor through strange worlds.
teams.bio: Midnight Elevator is our flagship long-form house team, known for weaving grounded characters into surreal situations. They perform weekly on the Mainstage and regularly appear in festivals across the country.

teams.name: The Rubber Chickens
teams.short_description: Fast-paced short-form games with high-energy hosts.
teams.bio: The Rubber Chickens bring classic short-form games to life with razor-sharp wit and audience interaction. This family-friendly house team is perfect for first-time improv audiences.

teams.name: Yes And Dragons
teams.short_description: Nerdy narrative improv inspired by epic quests and fantasy tropes.
teams.bio: Yes And Dragons creates a brand-new fantasy epic every show. From wizards to warriors, this narrative house team makes each performance feel like the finale of your favorite campaign.

teams.name: Office Hours
teams.bio: Office Hours turns your work stories into comedy gold. This house team specializes in slice-of-life scenes pulled from real audience suggestions about emails, meetings, and everything in between.

teams.name: Confetti Cannon
teams.short_description: Bold, colorful characters and musical mayhem.
teams.bio: Confetti Cannon is our musical and character-focused ensemble. Expect big emotions, big choices, and the occasional improvised song that will get stuck in your head all week.

teams.name: Longform Legion
teams.short_description: Experimental long-form formats and bold theatrical choices.
teams.bio: Longform Legion is a rotating cast of advanced performers who explore new formats, mashups, and genre experiments. Every show is different, but the commitment is always 100%.

teams.name: Side Quests
teams.short_description: Indie team specializing in whimsical genre mashups.
teams.bio: Side Quests is a beloved indie troupe that blends sci-fi, fantasy, and rom-com tropes into delightfully weird shows. They’re frequent guests in our late-night slots.

teams.name: Awkward Turtles
teams.short_description: Grounded, relationship-based improv about lovable weirdos.
teams.bio: Awkward Turtles mines the humor in everyday misunderstandings and missed connections. Their slow-burn, character-driven style is a favorite among improv nerds.

venues.name: Mainstage Theater
venues.directions: Located in the Arts District downtown. Entrance is on Laugh Ave between 1st and 2nd. Street and garage parking available nearby.

venues.name: Black Box Studio
venues.directions: Around the corner from the Mainstage Theater. Enter through the alley door marked Black Box Studio.

venues.name: Training Center - Classroom A
venues.directions: Two blocks north of Central Station. Take the elevator to the 2nd floor and follow signs for Classroom A.

venues.name: Training Center - Youth Annex
venues.directions: Entrance is on the corner of Improv Way and 4th. Look for the colorful mural. This space is dedicated to camps and youth programs.

classes.title: Improv 101: Foundations (Mondays)
classes.description: A welcoming 8-week beginner course covering core improv skills: listening, agreement, and building fun scenes with your classmates. No prior experience required.
classes.prerequisites: None. This is our starting point for new improvisers.

classes.title: Improv 101: Foundations (Tuesdays)
classes.description: Beginner-friendly 8-week class focusing on agreement, character, and group support. Great for building confidence on and off stage.

classes.title: Improv 101: Foundations (Wednesdays)
classes.description: Our core Level 1 curriculum offered on Wednesday nights. Learn to say "yes, and" while discovering your comedic voice.

classes.title: Improv 101: Foundations (Thursdays, Early Evening)
classes.description: An earlier 8-week beginner section for those who prefer to start right after work.

classes.title: Improv 101: Friday Night Fun
classes.description: A casual, social 8-week beginner class that meets on Friday nights. End your week with laughter.

classes.title: Improv 101: Foundations (Mondays, Premium Section)
classes.description: Small class size with extra coaching notes and individual feedback, limited to 10 students.

classes.title: Improv 201: Scene Work & Relationships
classes.description: Build on your Level 1 skills with a focus on grounded scenes, emotional connection, and heightening.
classes.prerequisites: Completion of Improv 101 or equivalent experience.

classes.title: Improv 201: Game of the Scene (Tuesdays)
classes.description: Learn how to identify and play the comedic "game" of a scene using patterns, framing, and point-of-view.
classes.prerequisites: Improv 101 or equivalent and at least one performance-focused class.

classes.title: Improv 301: The Harold
classes.description: Dive into the classic long-form structure with openings, group games, and multi-beat scenes.
classes.prerequisites: Completion of Improv 201 or equivalent intensive training.

classes.title: All-Levels Saturday Improv Lab
classes.description: A 4-week, all-levels class that mixes warm-ups, games, and scenework. Ideal for brushing up skills or trying improv before committing to a full course.

classes.title: Intro to Musical Improv (Sundays)
classes.description: Learn to improvise songs with live accompaniment. No musical training required, just a willingness to sing.
classes.prerequisites: Comfort singing in front of others is helpful but not required.

gift_card_templates.name: Digital Gift Card
gift_card_templates.description: Send a digital gift card by email that can be used for shows, classes, and camps. Choose from multiple designs, including birthday and holiday themes.

gift_card_templates.name: Digital Show Night Gift Card
gift_card_templates.description: A digital gift card perfect for tickets and concessions on show nights.

gift_card_templates.name: Physical Gift Card
gift_card_templates.description: A traditional plastic gift card mailed in a branded envelope. Redeemable at the box office or online.

gift_card_templates.name: Premium Boxed Gift Card
gift_card_templates.description: A keepsake boxed gift card with a foil-stamped sleeve, ideal for special occasions.

youth_camps.title: Teen Improv Camp: Performance Lab (Session A)
youth_camps.description: A two-week improv intensive for teens focused on ensemble building, character work, and short-form games, ending with a showcase for family and friends.

youth_camps.title: Teen Improv Camp: Character & Sketch (Session B)
youth_camps.description: Teens create bold characters and learn the basics of sketch writing, culminating in a short, scripted-and-improvised hybrid showcase.

youth_camps.title: Teen Improv Camp: Morning Intensive
youth_camps.description: A fast-paced morning camp for experienced teen improvisers, focusing on advanced scenework and long-form structures.

youth_camps.title: Teen Improv Camp: Storytelling & Narrative (August)
youth_camps.description: A two-week narrative improv camp where teens create ongoing stories, learning long-form techniques and collaborative storytelling.

youth_camps.title: Kids Comedy Camp (Ages 8–12) – Full Day July Session
youth_camps.description: Younger performers spend the day playing improv and theater games, making friends, and creating original characters and stories.

youth_camps.title: Kids Intro to Improv (June Morning Camp)
youth_camps.description: A one-week morning camp introducing improv basics through games and storytelling activities.

youth_camps.title: Spring Break Improv Jam (Mixed Ages)
youth_camps.description: A mixed-ages camp for ages 10–15 that combines improv, physical comedy, and basic sketch creation over spring break.

events.title: Friday Night Frenzy: Short-Form Showcase
events.subtitle: Fast-paced games with our house cast
events.description: Kick off your weekend with a high-energy burst of short-form improv games, audience suggestions, and plenty of big laughs. A great pick for first-time improv audiences.

events.title: Late Night Experiment
events.subtitle: Experimental long-form with Longform Legion
events.description: Our late-night sandbox for bold new formats, genre mashups, and theatrical experiments. Featuring the Longform Legion ensemble.

events.title: Happy Hour Improv
events.subtitle: After-work laughs before the late shows
events.description: Drop by after work for a laid-back happy hour of improv games, drink specials, and early-evening fun.

events.title: Mainstage Spotlight Gala
events.subtitle: Featuring Midnight Elevator & friends
events.description: A special extended evening of long-form improv with our flagship house team Midnight Elevator and special guests.

events.title: Sunday Family Improv Matinee
events.subtitle: All-ages show with The Rubber Chickens
events.description: A fast, silly, and interactive improv show designed for kids and grownups to laugh together. Clean comedy, big characters, and lots of audience suggestions.

events.title: Sunday Night Headliners
events.subtitle: Spotlight sets from our top teams
events.description: A rotating bill of our most popular ensembles sharing the stage for an evening of sharp, smart improv.

events.title: Teen Camp Showcase
events.subtitle: Featuring our July Teen Improv Camp students
events.description: Support our Teen Improv Camp performers as they share what they’ve been working on over two weeks of camp. Family-friendly and open to the public.

events.title: Intro to Improv: Date Night Edition
events.subtitle: Beginner-friendly afternoon workshop for pairs and friends
events.description: Warm up for your Saturday night with a playful, low-pressure intro workshop. Designed for couples and friends with no prior improv experience.

events.title: Intro Improv Weekend Starter
events.subtitle: Beginner workshop in our Training Center
events.description: A friendly, beginner-focused workshop that introduces the basics of "yes, and", listening, and support. Great as a solo activity or with friends.

events.title: Saturday Date Night Improv
events.subtitle: Rom-com-inspired improv with Office Hours
events.description: Turn your night out into a rom-com as our ensemble Office Hours builds a fully improvised evening of meet-cutes, mix-ups, and happy endings.

events.title: Mainstage Saturday Headliners
events.subtitle: Featuring Midnight Elevator
events.description: Our flagship Saturday night show with Midnight Elevator performing a high-energy, character-driven long-form set.

events.title: Midnight Elevator: Friday Night Long-Form
events.subtitle: House team showcase
events.description: Midnight Elevator creates an entirely new world each week, inspired by a single audience suggestion.

events.title: Midnight Elevator: Friday Night Long-Form
events.subtitle: House team showcase
events.description: Another brand-new improvised show from our flagship ensemble. No scripts, no repeats—just pure in-the-moment creativity.

events.title: Midnight Elevator: Friday Night Long-Form
events.subtitle: House team showcase
events.description: Grounded characters, surprising turns, and big ensemble play from one of our longest-running house teams.

events.title: Midnight Elevator: Friday Night Long-Form
events.subtitle: House team showcase
events.description: Close out the month with another wild ride in the Midnight Elevator universe.

events.title: Saturday Kids & Family Matinee
events.subtitle: Interactive improv for kids 7+
events.description: A playful afternoon show packed with games and stories designed for families. Volunteers from the audience are invited to join some of the games onstage.
